creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Please close this pr.  As was pointed out to me (thanks for not flaming me
guys) this was a stupid port since it wasn't native and source code was
available.  I'll recompile this against Lesstif when the new version comes
out (by the end of August they say) and resubmit this in a native version.

At least I'm learning something - the hard way, but I'm learning!  

*********************************************************
Brett Taylor 		brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
http://peloton.physics.montana.edu/brett/
